name: Tinta Blog
tagline: Real-time blogging platform with rich-text editor and authentication
description: A modern blogging platform built with real-time data powered by Convex. Features a rich-text editor (Novel) with slash commands, image uploads, code highlighting, and user authentication via Clerk. Supports post creation, reading, and likes with instant updates.
highlights: Rich-text editor with slash commands, image uploads, and code syntax highlighting
Real-time data sync with Convex backend
User authentication and authorization with Clerk
Webhook integration for user sync between Clerk and Convex
Dark mode support with theme toggle
